steps.title: Use the spread mechanism
steps.content: The fungus spreads from tree to nearby tree through the air. The surviving Nacional trees were found in a hard-to-reach valley, suggesting they were geographically isolated from infected trees.

steps.title: Connect distance to survival
steps.content: Choice A concerns scientists’ knowledge, not the trees’ survival. Choice B concerns when a fact was discovered, not whether the fungus could reach the valley. Choice D is about chocolate value, not disease spread. Distance from infected trees explains why the fungus may not have reached them. The answer is C.
